title: UberBond signed campaign policy
description: The output shape of src/automation/campaign-policy.mjs#signCampaignPolicy. A campaign policy wraps the pre-existing campaign-config.mjs schema (niche, geography, offer, price, caps, evidence/confidence thresholds, allowed hours, follow-up rule) with the additional owner-facing fields spec section E requires, then signs the whole record with an HMAC-SHA256 so tampering with a stored policy is detectable. Automation may only act (see src/automation/mode.mjs#evaluateAutomationGate) inside a policy for which isCampaignPolicyActive() returns true: valid signature, campaign.enabled true, and not expired.

campaign.description: The validated record produced by src/campaign-config.mjs#createCampaignRecord. See CAMPAIGN_CONFIG_SCHEMA in that file for the authoritative sub-schema (niche, geography via countries/cities/boundingBoxes, offer, price is implicit in the send caps for this pre-revenue outreach layer, dailySendCap, evidence threshold via minimumEvidenceConfidence, allowed hours via businessHourStart/End, follow-up rule via maximumFollowups/followupDelayDays).

allowedChannelTypes.description: Which outbound channel types this policy authorizes. Only 'email' is implemented by any adapter in this repository; the field is future-proofed for other channel types but signCampaignPolicy rejects anything else today.

postalAddressConfirmed.description: Owner confirmation that a physical postal address (CAN-SPAM footer requirement) is configured and will appear on every outbound message under this policy.

paymentRailConfirmed.description: Owner confirmation that a real payment rail (or explicit test/manual-only mode) has been reviewed for this policy before any checkout link is issued to a real prospect.
